## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this change? -->

- [ ] Ran against a local/kind cluster
- [ ] Covered the changed code paths with unit tests
- [ ] Checked edge cases (resource not found, no managed fields, multiple managers)

## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `make test` (`go test -race`) and `make lint` — both pass
- [ ] Added or updated tests; coverage stays ≥ 80%
- [ ] Commits are DCO-signed (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] Docs updated if observable behavior changed
